buttons.save_error: Failed to save. Please check your connection and try again.

step1.title: Please select your gender
step1.subtitle: Affects the calculation of your basal metabolic rate — men and women have different BMR coefficients

step2.title: How old are you?
step2.subtitle: Age is used in the Mifflin-St Jeor formula for calorie calculation
step2.error: Age must be from {{min}} to {{max}} years old

step3.title: Please enter your height
step3.subtitle: The primary physical parameter for calculating your basal metabolic rate

step4.title: Please enter your current weight
step4.subtitle: The main BMR parameter. We will track your weight change history

step5.title: What is your main goal?
step5.subtitle: Determines calorie deficit or surplus and the primary focus of the application
step5.lose_desc: Calorie deficit, focus on cardio and nutrition
step5.gain_desc: Calorie surplus, focus on protein and strength training

step6.title: Please enter your target weight
step6.subtitle_lose: What weight do you wish to lose down to?
step6.subtitle_gain: What weight do you wish to gain up to?

step7.title: How active are you?
step7.subtitle: Physical activity level (PAL) coefficient multiplied by BMR determines your daily calorie norm (TDEE)

step8.title: Please specify your dietary restrictions
step8.subtitle: Necessary for selecting suitable products and recipes. This step can be skipped
step8.allergy_placeholder: What are you allergic to? E.g. nuts, seafood…

step9.title: Would you like to track water intake?
step9.subtitle: Helps you remember to drink throughout the day. Norm = weight × 33 ml
step9.manual: ✏️ Yes, I'll set my own norm
step9.manual_desc: I'll specify how much I want to drink
step9.opt_none_desc: I don't want to track water

step10.title: Please specify your medical conditions
step10.subtitle: Used solely for AI recommendation accuracy. Data is not shared with third parties. Can be skipped
step10.warning: ⚠️ Used only for filtering AI advice
